since_last: 58% of 99 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.76%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +1.94% · Gold -0.48% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 58% of 99 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.76%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.76%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -0.84%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: META is the standout at +2.87%
cards.body: Leaders: META +2.87%, BABA +2.03%, NOW +1.81%, UEC +1.38%, INTU +1.32%. Laggards: INTC -2.38%, POWL -1.85%, CGNX -1.67%, NXPI -1.56%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.70% at $151.09
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.70% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
